category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Vietnam TCVN/QCVN, MOIT energy label/MEPS, and CR-mark requirements.

title.en: China-to-Vietnam Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Vietnam requirements: MOIT mandatory energy labelling and MEPS (TCVN 7828 / TCVN 7829), TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 safety, QCVN/CR-mark conformity, R-600a refrigerant, and in-country importer obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与越南要求差距对照：工贸部（MOIT）强制能效标识及最低能效标准（TCVN 7828 / TCVN 7829）、TCVN IEC 60335-2-24安全标准、QCVN/CR标志合格认证、R-600a制冷剂及进口商义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與越南要求差距對照：工貿部（MOIT）強制能效標識及最低能效標準（TCVN 7828 / TCVN 7829）、TCVN IEC 60335-2-24安全標準、QCVN/CR標誌合格認證、R-600a製冷劑及進口商義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Vietnamese legislation, TCVN standards, QCVN technical regulations, MOIT energy-labelling and MEPS thresholds, and CR-mark conformity requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行越南法律、TCVN标准、QCVN技术法规、工贸部能效标识及最低能效标准门槛值，以及CR标志合格认证要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行越南法律、TCVN標準、QCVN技術法規、工貿部能效標識及最低能效標準門檻值，以及CR標誌合格認證要求。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face five main Vietnam compliance gaps: (1) mandatory MOIT energy labelling and MEPS conformity to TCVN 7828 (energy efficiency) and TCVN 7829 (test method) — Chinese GB 12021.2 grades and the China Energy Label are not accepted; (2) electrical-safety conformity assessment to TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 with the CR mark (chung nhan hop quy) issued by a STAMEQ-designated body — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not recognised; (3) a Vietnam in-country importer must hold the registration and conformity records since there is no foreign-manufacturer self-declaration route; (4) energy-label registration and testing at a Vietnam-recognised laboratory before customs clearance and sale; and (5) R-600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge and flammability documentation must follow TCVN IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA. Grid voltage (220 V single-phase, 50 Hz) closely matches Chinese single-phase supply, so re-engineering for voltage is usually minimal.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临五大越南合规差距：（1）依据TCVN 7828（能效）和TCVN 7829（试验方法）的工贸部（MOIT）强制能效标识及最低能效标准（MEPS）合格认证——中国GB 12021.2能效等级及中国能效标识不被接受；（2）依据TCVN IEC 60335-2-24的电气安全合格评定，须取得由STAMEQ指定机构签发的CR标志（chung nhan hop quy，合格认证）——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被承认；（3）越南境内进口商须持有注册及合格认证记录，因无境外制造商自我声明途径；（4）在清关及销售前须在越南认可实验室完成能效标识注册及检测；（5）R-600a制冷剂条件良好，但充注量及可燃性文件须符合TCVN IEC 60335-2-24附件AA。电网电压（220V单相，50Hz）与中国单相供电高度接近，因此通常无须为电压重新设计。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨五大越南合規差距：（1）依據TCVN 7828（能效）和TCVN 7829（試驗方法）的工貿部（MOIT）強制能效標識及最低能效標準（MEPS）合格認證——中國GB 12021.2能效等級及中國能效標識不被接受；（2）依據TCVN IEC 60335-2-24的電氣安全合格評定，須取得由STAMEQ指定機構簽發的CR標誌（chung nhan hop quy，合格認證）——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被承認；（3）越南境內進口商須持有登記及合格認證記錄，因無境外製造商自我聲明途徑；（4）在清關及銷售前須在越南認可實驗室完成能效標識登記及檢測；（5）R-600a製冷劑條件良好，但充注量及可燃性文件須符合TCVN IEC 60335-2-24附件AA。電網電壓（220V單相，50Hz）與中國單相供電高度接近，因此通常無須為電壓重新設計。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity-assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. STAMEQ, MOIT, and the Vietnam national standards portal are the canonical sources for Vietnamese requirements.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
